name: ETH Trend Reset Continuation v1
thesis: ETH 1h transition often resolves by resuming the dominant directional state after a deeper reset rather than a shallow touch-and-go pullback. The edge should come from entering after structure recovery, then using active trade management instead of rigid fixed exits.
edge_mechanism: deeper pullback reset followed by continuation
invalidation_condition: If reset continuation cannot generate enough blind-window participation or post-cost PF above 1.0, then ETH 1h continuation should not be prioritized off this framing.

long: Take profit: 1.4 * ATR_14 above entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce 50% after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.7 * ATR_14
Final exit if Close crosses_below EMA_20 or at 10 bars
short: Take profit: 1.4 * ATR_14 below entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce 50% after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.7 * ATR_14
Final exit if Close crosses_above EMA_20 or at 10 bars

regime_filter.detection_method: Require fast-over-medium alignment, a deeper ATR pullback into EMA_50, then close-based recovery through EMA_20.
